mother.example: My mother cooks dinner every day.

father.example: My father works in an office.

brother.example: My brother is taller than me.

son.example: Their son is ten years old.

daughter.example: Their daughter goes to my school.
daughter.exampleZh: 他们的女儿和我上同一所学校。

grandfather.example: My grandfather rides a bike every morning.
grandfather.exampleZh: 我爷爷每天早上骑自行车。

cousin.example: My cousin visits us every summer.
cousin.exampleZh: 我表哥每年夏天来看我们。

student.example: There are twenty students in the class.

children.example: The children play in the park.

classmate.example: My classmate sits next to me.

sad.example: She is sad because she lost her dog.

nose.example: The dog has a big nose.

apple.example: I eat an apple every morning.
apple.exampleZh: 我每天早上吃一个苹果。

cake.example: We baked a cake for her birthday.
cake.exampleZh: 我们为她的生日烤了一个蛋糕。

egg.example: I eat an egg for breakfast.

pizza.example: Let us order a pizza tonight.

rice.exampleZh: 米饭是我最喜欢的食物。

salad.example: I have a salad for lunch.

tea.example: I drink tea in the morning.

ice cream.example: Ice cream is delicious in summer.

spoon.example: I need a spoon for soup.

plate.example: Put the food on the plate.

bowl.example: I eat rice from a bowl.

glass.example: The window is made of glass.

thirsty.example: I am thirsty. I need water.

cold.example: I have a cold so I stayed at home.
cold.exampleZh: 我感冒了所以待在家里。

dinner.example: What do you eat for dinner?

meal.example: We cook three meals a day.

school.example: I go to school by bus.

blackboard.example: The teacher writes on the blackboard.

subject.example: How many subjects do you study?

exam.exampleZh: 你下次考试是什么时候？

library.example: The library is open until six.

playground.example: The children play on the playground.

grade.example: She got good grades this term.

dictionary.example: Look up the word in your dictionary.
dictionary.exampleZh: 在你的字典里查这个词。

lose.example: We do not like to lose.

bus.example: I take the bus to school every day.

car.example: My father drives a red car.
car.exampleZh: 我爸爸开一辆红色汽车。

plane.example: We went to Beijing by plane.

bike.example: I ride my bike in the park.

station.example: The bus station is near my home.

airport.example: We met him at the airport.

passenger.exampleZh: 所有乘客必须系好安全带。

bridge.example: There is an old bridge over the river.

road.example: Be careful when you cross the road.

traffic.example: There is a lot of traffic this morning.

boat.example: We took a boat trip on the lake.

helicopter.example: A helicopter flew over our school.
helicopter.exampleZh: 一架直升机从我们学校上方飞过。

motorbike.example: He rides a motorbike to work.

taxi.example: I take a taxi to the airport.

underground.example: I go to work by underground.

tram.example: The tram goes through the city.

ferry.example: We take the ferry to the island.

arrive.example: What time does the train arrive?

tour.example: We went on a guided tour.
tour.exampleZh: 我们参加了有导游的游览。

visa.example: I need a visa to travel.

captain.example: The captain speaks to the passengers.

take off.example: The plane takes off at 3 p.m.

taxi rank.example: There is a taxi rank outside.

petrol station.example: Fill up at the petrol station.

garage.example: The car is in the garage.

fine.example: You have to pay a fine.

house.example: They live in a big house.
house.exampleZh: 他们住在一所大房子里。

kitchen.example: My mother cooks in the kitchen.

living room.example: We watch TV in the living room.

garden.example: There are many flowers in the garden.

fridge.example: The milk is in the fridge.

cupboard.example: The plates are in the cupboard.

shower.example: I take a shower every morning.

mirror.example: Look at yourself in the mirror.

wardrobe.example: Put your clothes in the wardrobe.

oven.example: Put the cake in the oven.

washing machine.example: I wash clothes in the washing machine.

basket.example: Put the clothes in the basket.

vacuum cleaner.example: I clean with a vacuum cleaner.

sun.example: The sun rises in the east.

raincoat.example: Wear a raincoat when it rains.

pollution.example: Air pollution is bad for us.

global warming.example: Global warming is a big problem.

dress.exampleZh: 她有一条漂亮的连衣裙。

sweater.example: I wear a sweater in winter.

pocket.example: There is a hole in my pocket.

tie.example: He wears a tie to work.

cotton.example: This shirt is made of cotton.

vest.example: He wears a vest in winter.

wallet.example: My wallet is in my bag.

branch.example: The bird is on the branch.

cave.example: The bear lives in a cave.

earth.example: The earth is wet after rain.

farm.example: My uncle works on a farm.

field.example: The farmers work in the field.

lake.example: We went swimming in the lake.

pet.example: My pet is a small dog.

rock.example: He sat on a big rock.

rose.example: She gave me a red rose.

seaside.example: We spent our holiday at the seaside.

village.example: My grandparents live in a village.
village.exampleZh: 我的祖父母住在一个村庄里。

wood.example: The chair is made of wood.

bat.example: A bat can fly at night.

butterfly.example: A butterfly is on the flower.

camel.example: A camel lives in the desert.

duck.example: The duck swims in the river.

giraffe.example: The giraffe has a long neck.

insect.example: An insect is on the leaf.

sea creature.example: A whale is a sea creature.

sheep.example: The sheep are on the hill.

whale.example: The whale is the biggest animal.

wild animals.example: We saw wild animals in the zoo.
wild animals.exampleZh: 我们在动物园里看到了野生动物。

zebra.example: A zebra has black and white stripes.

climate change.example: We should care about climate change.
climate change.exampleZh: 我们应该关注气候变化。

fuel.exampleZh: 汽车需要燃料才能行驶。

metal.example: The box is made of metal.

nature.example: We enjoy the beauty of nature.

rainforest.example: Many animals live in the rainforest.
rainforest.exampleZh: 许多动物生活在热带雨林里。

tin.example: He opened a tin of beans.

wildlife.exampleZh: 我们应该保护野生生物。

bay.example: The ship is in the bay.

capital.example: London is the capital of the UK.

desert.example: A camel lives in the desert.

soil.example: The soil is good for plants.

stream.example: We caught fish in the stream.

valley.example: The river runs through the valley.

nurse.example: The nurse gave me some medicine.

artist.exampleZh: 她是一位著名的艺术家。

musician.exampleZh: 他是一位有天赋的音乐家。

market.example: There is a market near my house.

free time.example: I relax in my free time.

head.example: He has a pain in his head.

ear.example: I can hear with my ears.

hand.example: Raise your hand if you know the answer.

arm.example: She broke her arm playing tennis.
arm.exampleZh: 她打网球时弄伤了手臂。

leg.example: He runs fast because he has strong legs.
leg.exampleZh: 他跑得快因为腿很强壮。

tooth.example: Brush your teeth twice a day.

medicine.example: Take this medicine three times a day.

neck.example: She wears a scarf on her neck.

pain.example: I feel pain in my leg.

careful.example: Be careful when you cross the road.

lazy.example: He is lazy. He does not work.

worried.example: I am worried about the exam.

east.example: The sun rises in the east.

west.example: The sun sets in the west.

behind.example: The cat is behind the sofa.

between.example: The shop is between the bank and the school.
between.exampleZh: 商店在银行和学校之间。

front.example: There is a garden in front of the house.

far.example: The station is far from here.

town.example: I live in a small town.

centre.example: There is a park in the centre of the city.

corner.example: The shop is on the corner.

morning.example: I get up early in the morning.

afternoon.example: We play football in the afternoon.

evening.example: I do my homework in the evening.

night.example: I go to bed at night.

tomorrow.example: I will go to the park tomorrow.

week.example: There are seven days in a week.

Monday.example: I go to school on Monday.

hour.example: The film is two hours long.
hour.exampleZh: 这部电影有两个小时长。

early.example: I get up early every day.

sorry.exampleZh: 对不起，我犯了一个错误。

excuse me.example: Excuse me, where is the toilet?

letter.example: I write a letter to my friend.

postcard.example: I send a postcard to my family.
postcard.exampleZh: 我给家人寄了一张明信片。

price.example: What is the price of this shirt?
price.exampleZh: 这件衬衫的价格是多少？

usually.example: I usually go to school by bus.

under.example: The cat is under the table.

above.example: The bird is above the tree.

until.example: Wait here until I come back.

although.example: Although it is raining, I will go out.
although.exampleZh: 虽然下雨，我还是要出去。

because.example: I like it because it is fun.
because.exampleZh: 我喜欢它，因为它很有趣。

save.example: I save money for a bike.

holiday.example: We go on holiday in summer.

guide.example: The guide shows us the way.

camera.example: I take photos with a camera.

charge.example: I need to charge my phone.

watch TV.example: I watch TV in the evening.
